slack.label: Slack signing secret
slack.description: Your Slack app's signing secret. Find it under Settings → Basic Information → Signing Secret. Required to verify inbound Slack event signatures.

slack.label: Slack bot user OAuth token
slack.description: Your Slack app's bot token (starts with `xoxb-`). Find it under Settings → Install App → Bot User OAuth Token after installing the app to your workspace. Used by native slack tools to call the Slack API.
